PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE CALENDAR FOR ATTORNEY ERICA A. REED
Off Calendar Jun-02-2023 Inactivate Attorney

PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY ERICA A. REED
Off Calendar Apr-06-2023 Continued To May-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition For An Order 1) To Ascertain The Beneficiaries And Determine To Whom Property Shall Pass 2) To Determine That The Settlor Failed To Provided For Living Child Solely Was Unaware Of The Child' Birth And To Impose A Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Erica Reed, via Zoom, for Devin Edmonds, Petitioner; Michael Freedman, via Zoom, for Cherie Le Miere, Petitioner; Jordan Pryor, via Zoom, for Niall Eyre, Respondent; Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Jewish Family and Children's Services, Trustee.

The court confirms that there are no objections to the Petition for the Approval of Settlement Agreement and advises counsel that the underlying petitions will be taken off calendar accordingly. The court advises of its position that retaining jurisdiction over the matter for enforcement of the agreement is not a mechanism that the Probate court uses and therefore, it intends to remove that section from the proposed order. Mr. Feder advises that his client's hoped that the probate court would retain jurisdiction as it would be helpful in any issues with the settlement agreement arise. The court reiterates its position regarding the jurisdiction issue and that CCP 664.4 is not a remedy in Probate.

After additional discussion, the Petition for the Approval of Settlement Agreement is taken under submission. All other matters are taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

Petition For Approval Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Oct-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Off Calendar

Petition 1. For An Order To Ascertain The Beneficiaries And Determine To Whom Property Shall Pass 2. To Determine That The Settlor Failed To Provide For A Living Child Solely Because Settlor Was Unaware Of The Child'S Birth And To Impose A Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Oct-12-2022 Off Calendar

Petition For An Order 1) To Ascertain The Beneficiaries And Determine To Whom Property Shall Pass 2) To Determine That The Settlor Failed To Provided For Living Child Solely Was Unaware Of The Child' Birth And To Impose A Constructive Trust
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Oct-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman, via Zoom, for Cherie Le Miere, Petitioner; Jordan Pryor, via Zoom, for Niall Eyere, Objector; Bruce Feder, via Zoom, for Jewish Family & Children's Services, Trustee.

Mr. Freedman reports that the parties have been mediating and that a settlement agreement is likely and asks for a continuance accordingly which Mr. Pryor agrees to. The court queries counsel regarding whether the parties might file a petition to approve a settlement agreement. Mr. Feder advises that he intends to discuss with his client regarding the petition to approve the settlement agreement.

After additional discussion, the matters are continued to Oct-03-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. A Status of Mediation is set for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

***After hearing (Aug-01-2022): upon further consideration by the court, all matters above are continued further to Oct-12-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar May-23-2022 Continued To Aug-01-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg, via Zoom, with and for Rebecca Paul on behalf of the Jewish Family and Children's Services, Successor Trustee; Michael Freedman, via Zoom, for Cherie Le Miere, Petitioner; Erica Reed, counsel pro hac vice, for Devin Edmonds, Petitioner; Jordan Pryor, via Zoom, for Niall Eyre, Interested Party.

The court addresses the application to admit counsel pro hac vice and asks if there are any objections to the petition. None are presented. The court grants the application for admission of Erica Reed to the bar of this court pro hac vice. The court turns to the accounting petition and advises of its intention to grant the petition without specifically approving fees to the trustee or its attorney and offers the court's position as to why. No objections to the court's tentative ruling are presented.

The Accounting is taken under submission. As stated above, the application for admission of counsel to the bar of this court pro hac vice is granted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
